connectorUiConfig.title: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence data connector ingests compromised payment-card tickets from the PRODAFT USTA platform into Microsoft Sentinel. Sensitive values are redacted at ingestion: the full card number (PAN) is never stored — only the BIN (first 6), the last 4 digits, the card brand, and the length are retained for triage.

sampleQueries.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where isnotempty(CardBrand)
| summarize Count = count() by CardBrand
| sort by Count desc

dataTypes.name: PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: PRODAFT USTA API key
customs.description: A long-lived PRODAFT USTA API key with access to the Payment Card Fraud Intelligence endpoint is required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Enter your USTA base URL and a long-lived API key, then select Connect. The connector authenticates to USTA with the `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>` header and polls every minute. To load history from before the connection time, deploy the **PRODAFTUstaPCFI-Backfill** playbook shipped with this solution.
